title: Continuation of the National Emergency With Respect to Specified Harmful Foreign Activities of the Government of the Russian Federation
summary: The President has continued the national emergency declared on April 15, 2021, due to specified harmful foreign activities of the Government of the Russian Federation. These activities, which include undermining democratic institutions, engaging in malicious cyber activities, fostering corruption, targeting dissidents, undermining regional security, and violating international law, continue to pose a threat to the national security, foreign policy, and economy of the United States. The national emergency, initially declared by Executive Order 14024 and expanded by subsequent executive orders, will remain in effect for another year beyond April 15, 2026.
